title: 可愛い後輩ちゃんのためだもの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, while I'm taking a break at the
racetrack...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So a younger Umamusume came up to me very
seriously and asked me for some advice on how to
run faster.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It would've been easy-peasy, lemon-squeezy if all
she wanted was an instinct-based approach, but
she actually wanted logic-based information.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not a trainer... I get the feeling that giving
that sort of advice would be pretty bogus, ya
know? Like that's mad irresponsible.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But since she mustered up the courage to ask for
my advice, I want to help her the best I can.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I figured I'd ask you what kinda advice
you would've given her since you're a pro and all.
choice_data_list: Teach her how to use her knees properly.
Work on improving her baseline endurance.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, I dig! So it's all in the knees! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're right. How you use the power in your
knees is really important, especially in the
beginning!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wicked. It's all coming to me now. Now that's the
bomb-dot-com! Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky spends the rest of the day
passionately teaching the younger Umamusume
on the other side of the track.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're right. It all boils down to how much energy
she's got in the first place. That might be where
her problem lies.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think I can give her some good advice
now! Rock on! Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky spends the rest of the day helping
the younger Umamusume train on the other side
of the track.
